items.author: @claudeai
items.title: Our developer conference Code with Claude returns this spring, this time in San Francisco, London, and Tokyo.
items.blurb: Claude开发者大会即将回归多城市举办，开发者可远程观看或申请现场参与，机会难得。

items.author: @Polymarket
items.title: JUST IN: Mysterious AI model appeared on OpenRouter and “declined to identify its developer,” fueling speculation it could be DeepSeek.
items.blurb: OpenRouter上线神秘AI模型，开发者身份成谜，可能为DeepSeek新品，值得跟踪。

items.author: @CUDOS_
items.title: 🚀 New models just dropped on ASI:Cloud Now live for inference: • MiniMax M2.5 - crushing benchmarks • Qwen 3.5-35B-A3B - Sonnet-level performance, efficient MoE • GLM 4.7 Flash - Ultra-fast
items.blurb: ASI:Cloud新增多款高性能AI模型，支持即时推理，适合开发者快速部署。

items.author: @XFreeze
items.title: Elon Musk on Grok: "Grok's doing pretty well and by some metrics it’s the best... The new Grok 4.20 is really good."
items.blurb: Elon盛赞Grok 4.20新版，预测能力领先，值得AI从业者关注。
